meta.title: SkiLuxe New Gudauri — Boutique Ski Apartments
meta.description: Boutique ski-in / ski-out apartments at the heart of New Gudauri, Georgia. Editorial design, mountain views, ski enthusiasts welcome.

hero.title: Ski in. Ski out. Linger.
hero.subtitle: Four boutique apartments in the heart of New Gudauri — designed for skiers who want quiet luxury after a day on the piste.

home.intro_title: Four apartments. Two of Gudauri's best buildings.
home.intro_text: Hand-picked units in Four Seasons F2 and Loft 2 — both walk-on to the gondola, both finished for travellers who notice the difference between thrown together and thoughtfully done.
home.feature_1_text: Step out, click in. Both buildings sit on the New Gudauri slope cluster — no shuttles, no taxis, no excuses to sleep in.
home.feature_2_text: Heated boot rooms, ski storage, drying racks, deep tubs. Built around the rhythm of a real ski day.
home.feature_3_text: Linen sheets, espresso machines, mountain-facing balconies. Less marketing, more substance.
home.season_text: Gudauri opens mid-December and runs through April. We hold high-season rates from the holiday week through Orthodox Christmas, with mid-season either side. Off-season summer stays welcome multi-week guests at a discount.

apartments.list_subtitle: Four units across two buildings. Pick the one that fits your trip.

f2_one_bedroom.label: One-Bedroom Apartment with Balcony
f2_one_bedroom.summary: Four Seasons F2 · One bedroom · 41m² · sleeps 4
f2_one_bedroom.description: Our largest unit. A separate bedroom with a king-size bed, a living room that opens onto a balcony with mountain views, and a fully kitted kitchen for long lazy mornings. The pick for couples-plus-two or a family of four who don't want to be on top of each other.

f2_superior_studio.label: Superior Studio
f2_superior_studio.description: An open-plan studio in our flagship building — clean lines, soft light, mountain-facing windows. A queen bed, a pull-out for a third guest, and direct gondola access downstairs.

loft_alpine_deluxe.label: Alpine Deluxe Studio
loft_alpine_deluxe.description: The most flexible unit in the collection: a deluxe studio with a clever sleeping configuration that handles up to five — perfect for a group of friends splitting the cost. Walk-on to the slopes in under two minutes.

loft_studio_balcony.label: Studio with Balcony
loft_studio_balcony.description: A cozy studio with a private balcony looking out over the valley. Right-sized for a pair or a trio of friends, and priced to leave room for an extra night.

booking.title: Reserve your stay
booking.subtitle: Hold the dates online. Pay directly with the owner — bank transfer, card, or cash.
booking.non_refundable_help: Reduced price in exchange for no refunds after booking.
booking.name: Full name
booking.success_text: We've put a 24h hold on these dates and notified the owner. You'll hear back shortly to confirm payment details. Booking reference: {ref}.
booking.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or message us on WhatsApp.
booking.error_unavailable: Sorry — those dates are no longer available. Please pick different dates.
booking.select_dates: Select dates to see the price

about.title: About SkiLuxe
about.subtitle: A small collection. A high bar.
about.p1: SkiLuxe is a family-run set of four apartments in New Gudauri. We grew up on these slopes and we know what a ski trip needs to feel like — and what it shouldn't feel like.
about.p2: Every unit is owned and managed by us. No call centres. No vague check-in window. If something needs fixing, one of us is in town to fix it. If you want a restaurant recommendation, you're getting one from the person who eats there.
about.p3: We host skiers, snowboarders, ski-tourers, and the occasional summer mountain runner. We don't host stag weekends.
about.where_text: New Gudauri sits at 2,200m in the Caucasus, on the Georgian Military Road two hours north of Tbilisi. The resort tops out above 3,300m with 70+ km of marked runs and some of the most accessible off-piste in Europe.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Fastest reply on WhatsApp. We answer in English, Russian, Georgian, and Hebrew.
contact.directions_text: From Tbilisi international airport, a private transfer takes 2h. We can arrange one — message us in advance.
contact.checkin_text: Self check-in with a code. We'll send full directions the day before your arrival.
